category_title: Children at risk of emotional and behavioral disorders (EBD) exhibiting maladaptive behaviors
minimal_context: The student is participating in a teacher-directed classroom activity where the goal is to sit and listen to a story.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: It is time for our reading lesson. Please sit in your seat and look at the board while I read the story.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Looks away from the board and begins tapping his hands repeatedly on the desk.)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Try to focus on the lesson.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Continues tapping his hands and starts making loud humming vocalizations, completely ignoring the story.)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: You need to sit quietly and listen right now.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Gets out of the seat, begins pacing around the classroom with inappropriate repetitive motor movements, and makes louder vocalizations while refusing to comply.)

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: It is time for our reading lesson. Please sit in your seat and look at the board while I read the story.

STUDENT: (Looks away from the board and begins tapping his hands repeatedly on the desk.)

TUTOR: Try to focus on the lesson.

STUDENT: (Continues tapping his hands and starts making loud humming vocalizations, completely ignoring the story.)

TUTOR: You need to sit quietly and listen right now.

STUDENT: (Gets out of the seat, begins pacing around the classroom with inappropriate repetitive motor movements, and makes louder vocalizations while refusing to comply.)

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: During classroom instruction and behavioral management
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Inattention, inappropriate movement, vocalization, and repetitive behavior

behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Inappropriate interactions, and repetitive motor movements
